extra_descs.desc:
Ever since the sun has set upon the eastern skys, and fallen every day to a
darken reign.  Parables of Nox roam the land abound and beyond.  Strong and
mighty warriors magicicians and those of lesser known march the ground mortal
fear to thread on.  But times grew short, the wars plagued the realms and death
had flexed it's wings.  Masses and mobs killings took place.  Sacrifices of
blood and bone soaked the grounds, making it moist and hungry for more.  The
war of the immortals was at it's darkest hour.  800 years later.  The wars
ended, leaving only the fittest to survive.  These great legends were loved and
feared, their faces to be thought unworthy to look upon, by mere mortals.
They were to be Gods and Greater Gods.  Casting the rotting and part soiled
remains of their victims into a pit and burried it far away from the town that
was built for the living.  Life soon begin to spawn by itself.  Life as it
seems cannot be stopped, and those that was once dead.  Are now known only to
be called commonly as the Undead.  In the land of Iuel this massgrave
rejuvinates it's movements and sends forth a great army of fearsome creatures.
Wrecking havoc in the city around, with skills so great, and magic so potent.
The wars between the living and the dead, has now just begun.  A place to rest,
away from the living.  They mock me, but soon they will die.  Everyone has to
die.

long_desc: A large tablet of Ieul hangs on the wall bearing messages for the common folk.

extra_descs.desc:
The face mask is transparent, practically invisble and covers the entire
head.

long_desc: A face mask gathering the surrounding forces of nature lays here translucent.

extra_descs.desc: The breastplate is unbelievably light and made from a see through material.

long_desc: An enchanted translucent breastplate lays here.

extra_descs.desc:
The sandals are made from a strange transparent material, they fit snuggly
and offer good protection and mobility.

long_desc: A pair of barely visible odylic sandals lay here collecting energy.

extra_descs.desc:
These strange restraints can now be worn about the wrists, offering greater
protection and even empowering your limbs with a strange feeling of strength.

long_desc: Looks like someone has escaped an odylic wristlock, and just left it here.

extra_descs.desc:
The transparaent ring glows with an unearthly light.  It emanates a feeling
of power and lust to help bring forth death.

long_desc: Small rings eluminating with odylic energy lays here nearly unseen.

extra_descs.desc:
The shield has a strange feeling of other worldly power and protection, it's
light and see through material is surprisingly durable.

long_desc: A large shield bursting with energy lays here.

extra_descs.desc:
The powerful amulet brings forth a lust for battle and blood.  It's power
invigorating and empowering it's wearer.

long_desc: An odylic amulet lays here collecting impurities.

extra_descs.desc:
The odylic greaves though transparent have a dark presence that seems to be
trapped within the magical armor.

long_desc: A pair of darken, battered odylic leg plates lay here.

extra_descs.desc:
The plates seem to magically mold into the desired shape of whom ever
attempts to wear them.

long_desc: Some odylic should plates lay here.

extra_descs.desc:
This blood red cloak is made from a thick velvet material that seems to flow
around it's wearer.

long_desc: A stunning cloak made from an erotic red velvet lays here wasted.

extra_descs.desc:
The strange transparent material is very flexible and seems to form to the
wearers hand when worn.

long_desc: Some odylic gauntlets lay here absorbing odylic energy.

extra_descs.desc:
The strange transparent material seems to have been the scabbard from a
strange sword.

long_desc: A piece of odylic slate lays here.

extra_descs.desc:
This strange bone has a feeling of power and anger about it.  It would make
a great weapon for bludgeoning someone to a pulp.

long_desc: A really long bone, belonging to a incredibly huge creature lays here now.

extra_descs.desc:
This handwrapping is inlayed with deadly spikes with which would do a number
on someone if punched.

long_desc: A handwrap with elugated spikes pertuding is here on the ground.

extra_descs.desc: The blade is long and polished, making it a deadly weapon.

long_desc: An enormously huge fillet knife is here, ready to fillet the world's largest tuna.

extra_descs.desc:
This abandoned soul has been transformed into a weapon, and now seems
useless.

long_desc: A rough looking weapon is here burnt for all it's made for.

extra_descs.desc:
This strange twig has a strange feeling to it.  It seems to fade in and out
of existence.

long_desc: A spikey twig lays on the ground waiting for you to step on.

extra_descs.desc:
The branch seems to glow red and blue on each end seeming to detect some
strange presence.

long_desc: A greeny moss covered piece of wood lays here.

extra_descs.desc:
The stick seems rotten, and diseased, but it's magical qualities make it
very apparent.

long_desc: A green and blue stick covered in algae lays here on the ground.
short_desc: a blue and green algae covered stick

extra_descs.desc: The stick is remarkably strong for it's size and condition.

long_desc: A red and yellow algae covered stick lays here.
short_desc: a red and yellow algae covered stick

extra_descs.desc: This stick has a homey feeling to it.

long_desc: A blue and brown algae covered stick lays here on the ground.
short_desc: a blue and brown algae covered stick

extra_descs.desc: The stick smells faintly of the ocean and is extremely sodden.

long_desc: A brown and marron algae covered stick lays here.
short_desc: a brown and maroon algae covered stick

extra_descs.desc: The stick has a strange evil blessing emanating from within itself.

long_desc: A slimy green moss covered twig lays here on the ground.
short_desc: a slimy green moss covered twig

extra_descs.desc:
This twig seemed to have once been ill and diseased but has now miraculously
recovered.

long_desc: A twig taken from a dead olive tree lays here.

extra_descs.desc:
The bark seems to have aged beyond it's normal years.  As if it's life had
been magically quickened.

long_desc: A piece of bark ripped from a tree has been left here rotting.

extra_descs.desc: The bark has the strange ability to detect forms of magic.

long_desc: A tree bark soaked too long in water has been left here.

extra_descs.desc: This disgusting extremity could make you drop or junk anything.

long_desc: A dried up animal's groin lays here smelling really bad.
short_desc: a dried up penis of a deer

extra_descs.desc:
The horn is dull and worn from age.  It seems to fade in and out of
existence, as if it was partially invisible.

long_desc: A rhino's horn lays here on the ground.

extra_descs.desc: The nipple has a strange ability to rejuvenate it's user.

long_desc: A very disgusting nipple has been ripped off some poor woman and sits here.

extra_descs.desc:
The testicle is shriveled and extremely small.  After seeing this you
believe you could see anything.

long_desc: A pair of very small testicles sits here.

extra_descs.desc:
This strange bag has the ability to rejuvenate those who dwell in the
mystical arts.

long_desc: A bag sits here on the ground smelling very tempting.

extra_descs.desc: The brass visor is poorly made and in need of a good shining.

long_desc: A brass rim made from badly forged brass lays here.

extra_descs.desc:
The chestplate has been beaten and bloodied from use.  Not very appealing,
but it would offer minimal protection.

long_desc: A long slate of brass lays here covering a lot of other equipment.

extra_descs.desc:
These sleeves are very unique, made from horns of an unidentifiable beast
they are extremely durable.

long_desc: A sleeve made from boiled and cut horn lays here.
short_desc: a pair of horn scaled sleeves

extra_descs.desc:
These leg plates are made from durable horns, very strange and unique
design.

long_desc: A longish plate made from scaled horns lay here

extra_descs.desc:
A set of brass hammered gauntlets.  Very stiff and unflexible, they are not
very well suited for maneuverability, but they do offer good protection.

long_desc: A pair of gauntlets made from shining brass lays here.

extra_descs.desc:
The brass piece is completely wrapped in cloth.  Making a very stiff and
supportive guard.

long_desc: A piece of cloth with a brass bar in the middle lays here on the ground.
short_desc: a brass supported cloth wrist wrap

extra_descs.desc:
The ring of brass has a small clasp that can be opened to place it around
the neck.

long_desc: A ring of brass lays here on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
This strange footwear is extremely awkward looking, but it may be useful
over watery terrain.

long_desc: A pair of green covered slimy mossy feet lay here.

extra_descs.desc:
The black wood appears to have been hardened by flame.  The tempering has
given it a smooth black polish.

long_desc: A flat piece of black wood lays here.

extra_descs.desc: These strange wings can be placed about your body.

long_desc: A pair of red and gold wings is here half burried.

extra_descs.desc:
The blade is finely honed and polished.  An excellent weapon for almost any
battle.

long_desc: A broadsword made from an incredible weaponsmith lays here.

extra_descs.desc:
The sword is made from an unkown material.  It's gray shine like that of
metal, but it is not metal.

long_desc: A medium sized sword made from a land far away sits here.

extra_descs.desc:
The axehead is two-headed, made from a strange gray material.  The head is
mounted on an oaken handle.

long_desc: A battleaxe from the land of Ieul is sits here humming.

extra_descs.desc:
The polearm is about two spans in length equipped with a nasty looking blade
on it's end.

long_desc: A polearm from the land of Ieul stands against the wall.

extra_descs.desc:
The mallet is made from a strange gray material.  It's head large and blunt.
The handle long and thin.

long_desc: A large headed war mallet from the land of Iuel is here.

extra_descs.desc:
The long tooth is over a hands length.  It's point very sharp, making it an
excellent weapon.

long_desc: The tooth of a grand sabertooth now lays here.

extra_descs.desc:
The spike ball is about the size of a human head.  Attach to a long chain
with a small handle.

long_desc: A spiked ball connected to a long wooden handle lays here.
short_desc: an Iuelic spiked ball and chain

extra_descs.desc: The vine has been weaved into a makeshift whip.

long_desc: A short rope made from vines lay here.
short_desc: a weed vine from the wetlands of Iuel

extra_descs.desc: The spike is about an arms length long and sharpened to a fine point.

long_desc: A sharp very long spiked jets out from the ground here.

extra_descs.desc:
The bank vault stands wide open.  All the coins and loot inside are fully
visible and ripe for the taking.  Except for a strange presence that you can
feel but not see.  Many have tried to loot from this bank, but the unseen
spirits have caused them to always fail.  Only a fool attempts to steal from
the dead city of Iuel.

long_desc: The bank vault lies open, waiting for someone to try to enter.
A gem, sparkling and rare in all favors is stuck in the ground
A blackish gem with the weight of a dead corpse is stuck here in the ground
A piece of mud like solid is stuck in the ground.
A long flat gem is here balancing itself one a small twig
